evidence_quotes.quote: i hope it can also include video games or games in general.
Us as the consumers should be able legally use and enjoy these artworks that we paid for without getting it remotely shut off or taken from us after a time.
It says "buy" on the games not "lease" or "loan".

paragraphs.text: Hello my name is Axel i would like to say that i think the Digital Fairness Act is a great idea! But i hope it can also include video games or games in general. We have seen from the Stop Killing Games EU Initiative getting 1.4+ million signatures that many feel as i do. That games and its consumers need more protections. Games are a form of art and most just disappear when the publisher or creator feels like stopping support without any protections this will keep happening and then no one can enjoy them ever again. Us as the consumers should be able legally use and enjoy these artworks that we paid for without getting it remotely shut off or taken from us after a time. It says "buy" on the games not "lease" or "loan". I think its only fair to be able to use what you have bought since thats how it used to work with physical games and music many years ago. I hope us people that pay for products get more rights worldwide! Thank you for reading have a good day :)
